cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Pillai, sir. This is Ramesh from Mozilla Firefox support. How are you today, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm good, thank you. Just a bit busy, haan.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: No problem, Anil ji. I'll keep it brief. I'm calling to follow up on the issue we resolved last week with your Firefox browser.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, yes! The browser was freezing. You guys fixed it, and it's working fine now. Thanks!

slow_thinking_rationale: At 42s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A support agent from [TECH_COMPANY] follows up on a resolved software issue to ask if the solution is still working and if the user is satisfied with the support they received.
